title: Sanath Nishantha’s brother remanded
body_lines: Three people including the former chairman of Arachchikattuwa Pradeshiya Sabha Jagath Samantha have been remanded until the 23rd of June.
They were produced before the Chilaw District Court on Monday (June 19).

Investigations were initiated into the brother of MP Sanath Nishantha and two others in connection with an assault at a filling station and obstructing the duties of a police officer on the 17th of June.
They had surrendered to the police and were placed under arrest after surrendering to the police on Monday morning.
